programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1994, cuando un vehículo blindado de Wells Fargo desapareció de un centro comercial de Glendale, Arizona, las autoridades locales y el FBI fueron de inmediato a recuperarlo, junto con la carga de casi un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Al principio, cuando David Wilkey fue asesinado de un disparo en la zona rural de Virginia en 1983, pareció un accidente trágico de cacería. Un tenaz investigador de seguros sospechó de una maniobra sucia, pero no tenía pruebas concluyentes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana del Día del Trabajador se convirtió en una pesadilla de homicidios mientras una ola de crímenes tenía aterrorizado a todo el país.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista arriesga su vida en una persecución de alta velocidad. Un sospechoso dice mentiras para escapar. Una persona en libertad condicional culpa a su mamá cuando lo interrogan por su pasado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso desesperado arriesga la vida intentando huir arresto. Un padre rehúsa mentir por su hijo violento. Una mujer malnutrida reporta a unos fantasmas violando propiedad privada.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una familia a fuerza tiene que escoger cuando un hombre agresivo ataca. La policía sospecha al ver gente en el asiento trasero de un auto estacionado. Un reincidente se captura al momento del delito.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Padre e hijo se enredan en un retén que termina mal. Una pelea en familia se agranda y vuelan partes del cuerpo. Un conductor desorientado no puede creer su suerte cuando lo siguen a una gasolinera.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un oficial toma una decisión sorprendente cuando un hombre armado rehúsa obedecer. Un criminal hace todo lo posible para no ir a la cárcel. Un coche gira hacia tráfico que viene a dirección contraria.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía recibe una pista sobre un fugado y entra en una persecución. Se detiene a un delincuente sorpresivamente cooperativo. La policía batalla al sacar a un infractor de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un oficial responde a un disturbio y el sospechoso rápidamente se revela. Un hombre aprende su lección sobre cinturón de seguridad. En un retén la policía descubre a un hombre triste con historia rara.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un desesperado intruso intenta evadir a la policía. Un hombre asustado quiere la atención de los oficiales, pero lo hace de mala forma. Los oficiales demuestran que la honestidad vale mucho más.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Saben tanto sobre el crimen como cualquier oficial, o cualquier criminal. Son los escritores de policiales y, a través de sus ojos, vemos el asesinato más asqueroso. Combinan las perspectivas de la aplicación de la ley, los delincuentes y el periodismo.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: La naturaleza puede ofrecer grandes pistas para resolver asesinatos brutales, pero se necesita el ojo agudo de los entomólogos y los botánicos forenses para descifrarlas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Cada familia tiene sus secretos. A veces, las relaciones familiares terminan en la muerte. Cuando resulta que el crimen es familiar, los investigadores utilizan la ciencia forense para resolver el misterio.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Cuando se comete un asesinato y el engaño nubla las pruebas, los investigadores recurren a la ciencia y la tecnología para descubrir la verdad, exponer una mentira asesina y capturar al homicida.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Comenzando en California en 1995, un asesino en serie atacó a varias mujeres vulnerables. Al principio, se mostraba encantador y generoso, y con rapidez se tornaba violento. Era despiadado en sus crímenes y rápido en sus escapes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo en llamas en un callejón oscuro arroja luz sobre un asesino. Sus compañeros en el crimen contarían la historia, si hubieran sobrevivido.

programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Worriz and Cragger go off on a mission of their own, but get captured by the Spiders. Now it is up to the rest of the heroes to go on one last daring rescue mission.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: In the Scorpion Cave, Laval has been separated from his friends and must overcome his greatest fear to rescue the Lion Legend Beast … or will it rescue him?

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: After the battles in the Outlands, all is well in Chima. But in a deep, dark cave, ancient Tribes of fierce Hunters awaken after thousands of years of dreamless sleep. They march to the surface … their goal: To conquer all the Chi.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Wanting to prove himself as a serious musician to Zoey, Logan inadvertently unleashes his 'sick beats' on the dream world resulting in much mayhem.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers go after their missing memories and the dream chasers try find the Never Witch's hide-out while Phil covers for them at Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers feel like they should be taking the fight to the Never Witch instead of training for R.E.M. trials. Zoey's haunted by her most painful memories and Mateo continues to only dream craft Z-Blob-related items.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Set in the past, the dream chaser duo Hannah and Beau argue while young Oz searches for Lunia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey tries to rebuild a relationship with her estranged dad and Logan steps up his training to beat Astrid.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A close call with the Never Witch places Mateo in the forests of Wildoria while Beau is on an adventure in the dream world with Zoey.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: The Mayor and Carol work late when all manner of strange events begin to happen. Extreme Sports host, Dynamo, holds a competition to see who will go on the City Mars mission.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Firefighter Buster Lloyd gets the opportunity to live out his fantasy of being a police officer. Sanitation worker, Shirley Keeper, educates local residents on how to take care of their City.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars/launch fever! Astronauts reach Mars orbit and prepare to launch their probes, but Tippy Doorman has other plans.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Vic and Owen find themselves, along with Sinjin, in the middle of a massive dino-fight in the old Jurassic Park Visitor Center!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: It's déjà vu for Alan Grant as he returns to Isla Nublar and winds up stranded in the jungle during a dangerous storm with injured Simon and hero-worshipping Owen!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking in the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible ... but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Zane's search for Arin leads to an old friend but lands him in the middle of the Forbidden Five's hunt for the Prismatic Blades.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos revivirán los mejores momentos de los primeros 10 episodios de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Pero cuidado que esto aún no termina, todavía faltan los últimos tres episodios de Súper Shore 2.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento
programme.desc: La llegada de Michelle hace arder la villa. La sala tornado pone de cabeza los sentimientos de Leslie. Christian inicia la llama del amor con Andrea mientras que Diana provoca una explosión.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?
programme.desc: Lalo viene a terminar los pendientes con Leslie y a Isaac le toca atacarse. Lizbeth explota contra Isaac y Rufas. Yurgenis se libera en un catamarán, sin la sombra de Brandon. El nuevo ex llega muy salsa, pero de la que no pica.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El jaque mate
programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Fernando está en crisis, peleado y distanciado de todos, incluso sus amigos de Acapulco Shore. Ya ha tenido cruces con Potro, Abraham, Igor, Mane y Esteban. Mientras tanto Electra y Esteban deberán trabajar juntos en el bar de la playa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega una sorpresa enorme para Potro que lo pondrá en jaque y en un triángulo amoroso en el que no esperaba estar. Y el resto de la casa sigue tenso aún con la partida de Fernando.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La costa del sol se ve conmocionada por el arribo de Karime y Labrador que se integran con todo a la fiesta de los Súper Shore, mientras tanto en la casa Arantxa y Mane le tienden una trampa a Talía, la operación pez se pone en marcha.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores reunidos revivirán los mejores momentos de los primeros 10 episodios de sus segundas vacaciones en un especial confidencial. Pero cuidado que esto aún no termina, todavía faltan los últimos tres episodios de Súper Shore 2.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Jade conoció a William a través de las redes sociales y descubrió que él en verdad era una popular estrella de las redes sociales. Pero ella teme que detrás de las conversaciones no esté William, porque él se niega a verse con Jade.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: En la era digital, los jóvenes encuentran el amor online, conectándose con personas que jamás han conocido cara a cara.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes on a penthouse listing where the owners have overspent; Steve hustles to sell his ex-girlfriend's apartment and her next-door neighbor's unit in record time; Ryan has to sell out a Brooklyn building for a first-time developer.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan hits a speed bump in his attempt to get to Shanghai with $1 billion in business on the line; Fredrik's tensions with his co-lister put a potential deal in jeopardy; Steve gets a chance to work for a dream client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When a deal falls through, Steve's solution for getting the unit sold may end up draining his bank account; Fredrik launches a NoHo development with a creative but risky marketing campaign; Ryan mentors a young broker on a townhouse listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan's caught in a tricky situation when selling a team member's Tribeca home; Steve gets his first shot at selling an entire building; Fredrik tries to sell an overpriced penthouse while mentoring a co-lister who wants a spot on his team.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik lists an infamous Chelsea townhouse with a seller whose reputation for firing brokers precedes her; Ryan entrusts a Park Slope listing to a brand new agent with unorthodox methods; Steve tries a change in strategy with the Circa building.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.desc: Ryan searches for the perfect townhouse for a bickering couple; Steve is under pressure to choose a new brokerage; Steve and Fredrik travel to St. Lucia to pitch buyers on ocean-side villas; Steve is forced to make a career-changing decision.

programme.desc: Ryan tries to win back a billion dollar development by throwing an event; Steve is anxious to prove himself as he battles the elements to sell a penthouse; Fredrik takes on a stunning new building and is pressured to make a major celebrity sale.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Steve tries to find a buyer for a charming country home on a piece of land in Upstate New York; Ryan has two weeks to work his magic on a skyscraper; Fredrik tries to impress his clients by selling an apartment to actor Bruce Willis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan is challenged with selling the biggest townhouse in the neighborhood; Steve tries to sell an apartment with a location flaw; Fredrik gets creative to market a billion-dollar project that's in shambles; Ryan and Emilia make a major decision.

programme.desc: Fredrik may need to go back to the 1980s to find a buyer for his listing; Ryan has to sell a mansion built on top of a freeway; Steve goes to upstate New York to help a billionaire client but realizes his listing may turn out to be a "Payne."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A dog that collects rare stamps -- on command from the IMF -- figures in a perilous journey to the stronghold of a narcotics kingpin (guest star Fernando Lamas) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Carl Betz, Barbara Anderson, and Robert Conrad guest star alongside Jim Phelps who, with the aid of Barney's electronic wizardry, takes on the guise of a hot-shot pool hustler to break up an illegal gambling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Goulet guest stars as Joe Epic, a syndicate crime leader and key figure in an IMF plan to free a captured undercover agent.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers puts together a small fountain and shows a video of fountains around the world. King Friday gives a fountain to Westwood. Mayor Maggie searches for water for the fountain and is squirted by Lady Elaine Fairchilde.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with paramedics who show him an ambulance and some of the equipment they use.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Chainey Umphrey and sees a gymnastics demonstration. Lady Aberlin and Neighbor Aber have built a feathered contraption over the Trolley tracks to help them catch the speeding Trolley. Lady Elaine falls on the feathers.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of his own parents and visits Negri's Music Shop where jazz violinist John Blake and his son play music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits pediatrician Dr. Jane Breck, who shows young viewers what might happen during a child's routine checkup. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Cousin Mary Owl plans a cousin reunion!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Who does the puppet voices in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe? Mister Rogers shows how he works some of the puppets and visits with the voice of Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At Chef Brockett's bakery, Eva Kwong's grandmother makes special Chinese dumplings, and Mister Rogers talks about how children can learn about so many things from adults.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brandon Margulies explains how to play a video game. Keith David shows how the machine works. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is getting ready for the Olympic games. Lady Elaine has decided to make it snow.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers, with the help of his ventriloquist dummy, learns that sign language and talking can be two different ways of saying the same thing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: ¡Dave cuenta que los regaños constantes de su novia lo han arrojado a los brazos de una mujer de 72 años! A continuación, Joe está a punto de decirle a su hermosa novia que tuvo un rollo de una noche con alguien increíble.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kiki y Kat eran compañeras de trabajo que se enamoraron. ¡Pero ahora Kat dejará a Kiki por un hombre! Después, Cedric viene a decirle a su novia que quiere llevar su relación a otro nivel... y a otra persona.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: The Real Story With Riley Lewis

programme.title: ONE Vault

programme.title: ONE Event

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hatches a plan to help Sanji, but he'll have to go alone to avoid an all-out war with Big Mom. Meanwhile, Kin'emon and Kanjuro finally arrive at Zou, unwittingly setting the stage for the Minks' thirst for revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The samurai have landed! And they make their way into the country of Zou unaware of the welcome they will receive by the Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Revelations abound as the true nature of the Wano clan and their relationship with the Minks is revealed! Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined! But even more shocking - the visage of Raizo the Ninja!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mysteries of ninjutsu enthrall the Straw Hats as Raizo, the implausible ninja, makes his true powers known! Meanwhile, a mysterious artifact points the way towards the end of the Grand Line!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of the Ponegliffs is revealed - their true significance, and the story of their creation, leads closer to the Straw Hats than they might have imagined!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: More mysteries of the Kozuki Clan are revealed - and the samurai propose an alliance to help topple Kaido! But Luffy's response will shock the crew... and force the young daimyo to take responsibility!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dogstorm and Cat Viper share their story of being on the journey with Oden and Roger but are interrupted by Nami who is concerned about the sea route. Meanwhile, Jack is plotting to bring down the Mokomo Dukedom again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The plans are set! The Straw Hats divide and conquer, one group heading to save Sanji, the others to the Land of Wano! But in the final moments before their departure, the tremendous elephant island begins to quake!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After being aggressively attacked by Jack's fleet, the monstrous Zunesha comes to life and beckons to those on its back! But can the Straw Hats understand its cry? And realize in time what the elephant island needs from them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the skirmish with Jack now over, the Straw Hats move on to trying to bandage the great elephant's wounds! But just as the whole island puts the plan into action, unseen danger lurks on horizon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and the others split up into four teams, each on different missions! Some from the Mink Tribe insist on leaving with Luffy's team! Meanwhile, Usopp makes a weapon for Nami that seems to work like magic!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's team sets out from Zou on their way to win back Sanji! But they didn't realize there is one more crewmember than they have bargained for!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Carrot stows away! And settles in with the Straw Hats as they make their way to rescue Sanji! Meanwhile, in the Sakura Kingdom, Dalton and Kureha are getting ready for the Reverie so as their former enemy in his newly-built kingdom…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: News of the raid on the Revolutionary Army reaches Luffy! But that's the least of their worries as they face a storm and a sudden lack of provisions! Meanwhile, Emperor Kaido fumes with anger at the reckless generation of upstarts!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sneaking in to the Navy island facility to replenish their food supply, Luffy and the others risk being caught out in the open! Will their infamy make them easy to spot by the hotheaded Navy recruits around them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The jig is up as Luffy and the others make a daring dash to avoid the furious Navy! Can they escape without having to turn to fight - and after they've had a chance to raid the cabinets for food?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Making a mad dash for the Submerge with the food they stole, Luffy and the others have to get through some of the Navy's upstart soldiers! Grount, whose arm holds incredible power, summons his training to challenge Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue to suffer from blazing heat and a perilous food crisis! As the seas finally calm, fishing is their only hope! Meanwhile, Sanji arrives in Big Mom's territory and keeps his cool - until he sees his bride-to-be!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in danger as the venomous fish poison courses through his body! With no antidotes on board, the Straw Hats must rely on a mysterious ship for help - a ship that bears a truly surprising crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On the edge of life and death, Luffy's only hope rests with Sanji's siblings! But even though they refuse to share an antidote, they may be able to save Luffy's life yet, giving him enough energy to plunge right back into trouble.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arriving on Cacao Island, Luffy and Chopper are in heaven as everything before their eyes is edible!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats confront Pudding - the fiancée of Sanji! But when they challenge her for Sanji's heart, her answer shocks them! Meanwhile, an ominous and mysterious message may spell doom for the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The dangerous waters around the Whole Cake Island harbor terrifying creatures that pose a challenge for the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Mama slips into a bout of her sickness and ravages her own land in search of a specific pastry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Mom rampages through the Whole Cake Island in search for sweets - but when the kitchen can't prepare them fast enough, her own son steps in to curb the carnage, with deadly results.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats draw closer to the Whole Cake Island, Pedro shares his sordid past in Big Mom's territory - and hatches a plan to win back Sanji and take an item of great worth from the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook and Pedro head out in a submersible to infiltrate Big Mom's stronghold! Meanwhile, Luffy, Nami, Chopper and Carrot head into the island chasing the image of Sanji, only to be distracted by the endless supply of sweets and a second Luffy!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A "more powerful" Andromeda ship explodes due to likely sabotage, forcing Dylan's crew to save them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka endangers both her crew and an entire planet when a former love shows up.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda receives a cry for help from Rev Bam.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: After a Commonwealth planet is attacked by Pyrian pyroformers, Dylan is forced to fight to protect the new planet.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan hears voices beckoning him to a planet of "fire and ice," so he pursues, even though it means crossing hostile Nietzschean-controlled space.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: While caught in a battle between two Nietzschean prides, the crew captures a hostile who claims that his pride possesses a map of the slipstream.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A wrong turn after exiting a slipstream sends the Andromeda into the Prolon system. They rescue an escape pod from certain disaster, but the pride wants it back.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Scars
programme.desc: Johhny's decision to join the re-election campaign of Stillson's (Sean Patrick Flannery) chief opponent, Harrison Fisher (Gerald McRaney) has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Misbegotten
programme.desc: Johnny is kidnapped by three young women who demand his help in solving a murder mystery from the past.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Cabin Pressure
programme.desc: On a flight to Washington with Purdy (David Ogden Steirs), Johnny has a vision of their plane crashing and must convince the pilot and onboard Air Marshall to risk the lives of everyone on board.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby helps Fisher and reveals her family's connection to the Evil Dead. Ash and team follow a clue from the demon Eligos, but Kelly pays a price.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Kelly's current state puts others in jeopardy. This forces Pablo to make a brave move and Ash to reveal a new side to his character. Ruby and Fisher join forces in pursuit of Ash.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Pablo and Kelly notice something ominous between the Book and Brujo's pendant. Ash promises to visit Lem, but Fisher shows up for an almighty showdown with her former boss.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly, now joined by Fisher, arrive at the survivalist camp in the midst of chaos and must go to extreme measures to escape. Meanwhile, more is revealed of Ruby's mission.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash attempts to bury the book to end the Evil, but first he must contend with other, more physical things from his past. Fisher faces a horrific change in Ash.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a devoted mother with a bright future in show business is ruthlessly gunned down, a number of suspects emerges; just as detectives think they have the killer in their sights, the investigation takes a jaw-dropping turn.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman and his closest friend are found shot execution-style; police have little to go on until a surprising development leads investigators to a killer no one ever suspected.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a brilliant scientist and devoted family man is found beaten to death, the evidence leads to arrests, but an astounding revelation turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When police find the body of a popular taxi driver stuffed inside the trunk of his own car,which is submerged in a river, they struggle to find suspects -- until the truth begins to emerge.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A loving, single mother of two is the victim of a bizarre murder, leading detectives to investigate a number of suspects.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a recently divorced mother is found strangled to death on her couch, several suspects emerge until the killer is revealed to be someone close to home.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A recently retired woman is found murdered, and detectives struggle with a lack of evidence and try to track down a long list of suspects.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A hard-working young woman is discovered stabbed at the side of a road, leading police on a tireless investigation for 10 years to unveil a killer who is hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After a 35-year-old analyst for the NSA is fatally stabbed, police look at a number of suspects; detectives close in on the killer, but the investigation takes a shocking turn.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a 98-year-old widow is found dead in her entryway closet, a chilling discovery leads investigators to a killer in the community who harbors a dark secret.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A beloved resident of a tight-knit Nebraska town is murdered, leading detectives to look at a wide range of suspects before the trail leads to a killer who lives among them.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: After a woman is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a web of late-night encounters, secret lovers and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A woman is found stabbed to death in her apartment; with a long list of admirers, investigators uncover secret obsessions leading to a sadistic killer suspected by no one.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is strangled to death in the middle of a Hawaiian paradise; investigators quickly focus in on two suspects, but nothing comes easy as they spend more than a decade striving to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A retired couple are found beaten to death in their country club estate, but detectives soon discover that what happens in Vegas doesn't always stay there as they hunt down this monstrous killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover; the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs four people their lives.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found dead in a lake; as her small town grieves, law enforcement finds itself on a 20-plus year investigation that leads to a killer who was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day!/Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Capt'n Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a town party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea captained by a "ghost" Ryder and the Paw Patrol must save the ship and discover the ghost!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off - Ryder and the PAW PATROL have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's carrots are disappearing and she calls Ryder and the Paw Patrol for help. /Katie is excited to be entering one of the Paw Patrol pups into a puppy grooming competition "Puptacular" in the next town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay. /When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to help Mayor Goodway bring it back!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station!/When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks!/The PAW Patrol must pick all Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase, and Rubble hatch a plan to help sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach!/There's a beached baby whale in Adventure Bay! Can the Paw Patrol work together to reunite it with its mother?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes?/Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the Adventure Bay Train Station, before the next train comes./Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock to fix the lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. /When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain./The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster - Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! /Mayor Goodway's purse chicken "Chickaletta" has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new "super trike"./Marshall proves he is a true hero when he stops to put out a real fire on the beach during a race against the clock for a trophy.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A retired general heading a local cleanup commission is charged with murder when the community's crime boss is found dead.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A columnist is slain and the witnesses who could absolve the accused refuse to testify.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A television producer is charged with murder when a ruthless young actor is shot to death during the filming of a gunfight.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: An executive who has been missing for two years returns on the day of an important stockholders meeting…but ends up slain.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A shady lawyer, a client facing a murder charge, and a woman witness demanding a payoff help complicate this case for Mason.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason is hired by a harassed business executive who wants to rid himself of a larcenous, freeloading nephew.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason is hired by a distressed woman who assumed the identity of a nonexistant cousin to report her own disappearance as a suspected suicide.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason takes the case of a chemist accused of slaying her employer when planted evidence is found to indicate that she had sold secret formulas to a rival cosmetics firm.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason is hired by a woman who is being blackmailed by a long-missing witness in the six year old murder of her husband.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason is hired by a distinguished concert pianist's widow to determine whether the musician's fatal plunge off a cliff was a murder or suicide.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars work their magic when they're presented with handcuffs and leg shackles once owned by the legendary magician Harry Houdini.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars meet a man with a handwritten lost poem from rock legend Jimi Hendrix. Will the rare Hendrix verse provide new insight into the '60s icon or will the cryptic words remain locked in a purple haze of mystery?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Help the Pawn Stars solve the crime of the century when a man brings in a detective's case file from the infamous Lindbergh baby kidnapping.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Make sweet music with the Pawn Stars as they check out a 1763 Stradivarius violin. Found in an attic, could this violin play a tune worth a million bucks or will this deal hit a sour note?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have a chance to buy a 450 year-old book once owned by Sir Isaac Newton, but when hand-written notes.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Ice Chip Off The Old Block
programme.desc: The guys get tangled up in the Bigfoot monster myth when a "certified" lock of his hair drops into the shop.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Paintball Cajun Style
programme.desc: Two new items leave the guys star struck: A check signed by Judy Garland, and a 1932 World Series program for the game in which Babe Ruth famously "called" his home run.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Mumbo Gumbo
programme.desc: A famous canon rolls into the shop, and an old friend causes some Cajun confusion trying to pawn an old family gumbo recipe.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Horseplay

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Really Gotta Go Kart

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Jimmie's Increasingly Bad Day

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Flying solo in Northern Iowa, Mike comes across the "Goat Man" and combs through his amazing, hidden-away property of junk-filled fields and buses. An Illinois couple's home proves to be a collector's paradise.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank spot a White Castle burger joint on an Ohio farmer's front lawn and discover his extraordinary collection of vintage buildings and vehicles.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank stumble upon a potential mega-pick in Northeast Iowa, but will it yield any treasures? Danielle has a lead on a rare, 15-gallon antique gas pump.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike's hurt his back but can't afford time off to recuperate. The guys dive into a 92-year-old Iowa farmer's unbelievable collection but make a huge mistake in the process.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank bet on who is the best picker. The loser gets to wash their filthy van. Working against the clock, the guys try to strike a deal in a savvy seller's jam-packed barn.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank stumble across an amazing family junkyard in Maryland. Frank offers big money for a 1939 Plymouth coupe but the collector doesn't seem to want to part with it.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Leaving Iowa in the dead of winter, Mike and Frank head south to New Orleans. There they stumble upon a quirky antique dealer with a sprawling collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with the opportunity to add one of the world's most recognizable trophies to their collection--a Grammy.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI

programme.desc: Chances are, you are watching this program by satellite, one way or the other. Every day we use these wonders of human design, from communication and weather observation, to GPS and recourse management.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: The Hubble Telescope is nearing its end, the replacements are ready to go, ready to peer further back in time and space than can be imagined.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: The Hubble Telescope is nearing its end, the replacements are ready to go, ready to peer further back in time and space than can be imagined.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The next 12 months will see an intense rise in flight tests, demonstration launches and high priority flights. Some are on time others are not. We check the flight status of some of this new hardware and these new capabilities.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Orbit

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Shore to Shore
programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: With approximately 130 active volcanoes, Indonesia is arguably the most active place on earth. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer leads an expedition to some of Indonesia most remote and rarely visited volcanos.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanic folklore is reflected in Mexican history. One of their ancient legends tells the story of the Aztec warrior Popocatépetl - a giant active volcano - who erupts to wake his sleeping princess Iztaccíhuatl, a neighboring extinct ice capped volcano.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: In Indonesia we find regions where the air is so toxic that it's 40 times above human safe levels and sulphuric acid vents from the ground in dense yellowish clouds. Elsewhere, small volcanoes are so active, they are said to erupt every 15 minutes!

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Japan is going through a seismic crisis after the devastating Tsunami of 2011. We look closely at two very dangerous volcanoes; both are considered to be in the top 5 most dangerous on the planet.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys

programme.desc: Grand Nagus Zek, the leader of the Ferengi Alliance, pays a surprise visit to lowly Quark's Bar to host a conference on exploiting the Gamma Quadrant -- and names Quark, not his own son, as his successor.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: An alien criminal from the other side of the wormhole tempts Odo by telling the shape-shifter he can put the changeling in contact with others like himself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko, Kira, and Bashir are stranded in a war-torn world where it is impossible for the combatants to die.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Chief O'Brien is reluctantly "adopted" as a spiritual leader by a Bajoran village that annually follows the "Storyteller" to fight a demon of the town's collective fears.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A stubborn old Bajoran farmer forces Kira to take a good look at how much she has changed since her alliance with the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When members of the station find their fantasies coming to life, it becomes the prelude to a very real danger, which threatens everyone.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While an alien entity wreaks havoc with the station's computer, the irrepressible Lwaxana Troi sets her sights on romance--with Odo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo is caught in the middle when an alien influence pits Kira against Sisko in a deadly power struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira is forced to re-examine her post-occupation prejudices about Cardassians when her running battle of wits with a jailed man claiming to be a notorious death camp leader is actually his remorseful file clerk.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When a Bajoran spiritual leader objects to Keiko's secular teachings, she threatens to destroy the alliance between Bajor and the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira risks her life, and war with the Cardassians, to rescue a mythical Bajoran hero from a distant prison colony.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Relieved of her post and sent back to Bajor, Kira helps to reveal the hidden force behind The Circle—and a greater secret that could destroy them all.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While Sisko leads a daring last stand against the Bajoran takeover forces, Kira and Dax embark on a desperate mission to reveal the truth about the coup.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The ship is surrounded by creatures whose presence accelerates Kes' reproductive process and threatens Voyager's key operating systems.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Ensign Harry Kim awakens on Earth, where he's shocked to learn there's no record of his assignment on Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A strange spatial distortion afflicts the ship and has the entire crew literally lost on their own ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix and Paris must put aside their romantic rivalry over Kes after they crash-land on a toxic planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A mysterious force puts the crew in a delusional state that causes their most deeply buried thoughts and desires to surface.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay is stranded on a planet inhabited by natives with ties to his ancestors.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kes makes contact with Ocampa spacefarers and the female Caretaker, who may have the power to send the crew home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The theft of a transporter module by Kazon forces thrusts Chakotay into an explosive confrontation with his traitorous former lover Seska.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must escape from a city under siege by the Mokra, a brutal regime determined to crush the growing resistance movement against it.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After Torres reactivates a humanoid robot, she's drawn into a war between robotic enemies.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Hoping to strengthen Voyager's strategic position in the quadrant, Janeway reluctantly seeks an alliance with the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Paris makes history by becoming the first person to cross the transwarp threshold, but could pay for the achievement with his life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Unable to come up with a logical motive for a shipboard murder, Tuvok performs a mind-meld with the perpetrator that brings out Tuvok's "killer instinct."

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres races against time to stop a deadly self-guided missile on a collision course with disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: 23rd century: the Federation Starship U.S.S. Enterprise™ is on routine training maneuvers, and Admiral James T. Kirk seems resigned to the fact that this inspection may well be the last space mission of his career. But Khan is back...

programme.title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirk’s defeat of Khan and the creation of the Genesis planet are empty victories. Spock is dead and McCoy is inexplicably being driven insane. Then a surprise visit from Sarek, Spock’s father, provides a startling revelation.

programme.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
programme.desc: It’s the 23rd century and an alien power is evaporating the oceans. To save mankind, Kirk and his crew must time travel back to 1986 where they find a world of punk, pizza and exact-change buses that are as alien as anything they’ve ever encountered.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and his crew must deal with Mr. Spock's long-lost half-brother, who hijacks the Enterprise for an obsessive search for God at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: After years of war, the Federation and the Klingon empire find themselves on the brink of a peace summit when a Klingon ship is nearly destroyed by an apparent attack from the Enterprise. Both worlds brace for what may be their deadliest encounter.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With the proviso that he bring back a Goa'uld larva for study, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) returns to Chulak to stop the Goa'uld from enslaving his son Rya'c. Trouble is, Rya'c needs a larva to survive - and the only one available is Teal'c's.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team returns from the planet Oannes in a panic and minus Daniel Jackson, who was last seen being consumed by a column of flames. But as his comrades mourn him on Earth, Daniel is the captive of an amphibious humanoid creature known as Nem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The evil Goa'uld Hathor (Suanne Braun) escapes from a Mayan pyramid in Mexico. At the Stargate facility, she uses her charms to seduce the men into helping her take over the world. Can Samantha Carter and her female colleagues defeat her?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Capt. Carter returns with the sole survivor of a planetary plague - a little girl, Cassandra. As they become attached, Carter discovers the girl's terrible secret - a time bomb implanted by the Goa'uld. Can she save the girl - and the world?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Colonel Jack O'Neill and the team travel to Chartago, where Teal'c is recognized as once having been head Jaffa to the sinister Goa'uld Apothis. He's arrested for murder and put on trial for his life. Can his comrades save him?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Col. Sheppard and his team locate Dr. Carson Beckett on an alien planet where he is treating a small group of survivors of the Hoffan plague. But that same evening, a party of Wraith warriors arrives, threatening total annihilation.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A newly formed galactic coalition extends an invitation to Lt. Col. John Sheppard and his team to represent Atlantis at their next meeting. But on arrival, the team is immediately detained and must stand trial for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Atlantis is suddenly plunged into darkness, with only the top tier of the central tower unaffected. As Sheppard and McKay attempt to get to the top level, they discover that a force field has been established to prevent them from gaining access.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While Richard Woolsey (Robert Picardo) struggles to keep his position as the leader of Atlantis, and McKay (David Hewlett) and Zelenka (David Nykl) investigate a mysterious find, Sheppard is captured by an old enemy with plans to invade the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When the Atlantis team is given two weeks of vacation leave, Dr. Rodney McKay reluctantly accepts an invitation by his former rival, Malcolm Tunney, to attend a scientific demonstration that he claims will be the solution to global warming.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team prepares for the worst as board a Wraith hive ship over Atlantis. They're surprised to find the Wraith crew in stasis when a malfunction on the hive ship releases the remaining crew… who have been cannibalizing one another for food.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Jennifer Keller is observed behaving very strangely, extensive testing reveals nothing abnormal. But McKay’s investigation leads him to suspect that Dr. Keller and Neela Casol, a notorious criminal, have switched consciousnesses.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, Detective John Sheppard is with the Las Vegas Police Department and begins to investigate a strange series of murders believed to be the work of a bizarre serial killer. Has life changed or is this a dangerous Wraith plot?

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: After a run in with a demon who’s responsible for the death of the sisters’ mother, Prue, Piper and Phoebe are transported back to the 1970’s after casting a spell to try to prevent her death and their loss of powers.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando trata de violar a Jimena en el campo y Sara se lo impide. Ante las quejas de las Elizondo, Gabriela respalda a su esposo y llama calumniadoras a sus hijas. Rosario acosa a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar le da su merecido a Fernando, quien pone a Gabriela a elegir entre él y sus hijas, las hermanas convencen a Jimena de que se mude, Armando le pide a Rosario que no vuelva a la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le advierte a Belinda que no revele su paradero, pero Martín ya sabe que ella visita la hacienda. Los Reyes organizan la bienvenida a Jimena, Franco les regala a ella y Óscar una casa.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan se juega su destino provocando los celos de Paula, mientras Julieta siente que empeora su malestar y asiste al médico al sospechar que algo anda mal. Gaspar empieza a tener una crisis matrimonial por querer controlar a Guadalupe.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta deja salir sus instintos violentos y atropella a Pedro por rabia, llega a la casa perturbada, pero se mentaliza que no hizo nada. Luego acusa a Paula de atacarla al sostener una conversación subida de tono. Emilio continúa con el plan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde el control a causa de sus celos y termina peleando con sus propios hermanos. Lupe lo abandona por su actitud. Juan y Paula sufren por la separación. Modesto podría ser descubierto al llevar a cabo las órdenes de Emilio.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula continúan sufriendo en silencio por no estar juntos. Julieta alucina con que tuvo intimidad con Juan. Ella, preocupada, acude al médico para recibir los resultados de sus exámenes. Gaspar se disculpa con Lupe quien condiciona su regreso.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Tras sacarle un ojo a Gertrudis en el forcejeo, Gabriela logra fugarse de El Paraíso. Un camionero la lleva cerca de San Pedro, donde se reencuentra con su hijo. Alejandro consigue su pista, pero lo siguen. Gabriela está segura de que él la traicionó.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: De nuevo en el manicomio, Gabriela debe enfrentar la venganza de Gertrudis. Irene seduce a Alejandro y queda embarazada. Antonia anuncia que ellos se casarán. Alejandro consigue escabullirse y entrar en el psiquiátrico para ver a Gabriela.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gertrudis le dice a Alejandro que Gabriela padece de esquizofrenia y que no tiene cura. Alejandro le aclara a Irene que aunque se van a casar, a quien sigue amando es a Gabriela. Tras la boda, Irene va al manicomio y mortifica cruelmente a su rival.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Pasa el tiempo. David está más unido a su abuela y hay dos niños más en la casa. Patricia, frustrada por la ausencia de sexo con su esposo, termina besándose con Alejandro, quien, a su vez, detesta a su esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le advierte a Belinda que no revele su paradero, pero Martín ya sabe que ella visita la hacienda. Los Reyes organizan la bienvenida a Jimena, Franco les regala a ella y Óscar una casa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan siente envidia de Óscar y Jimena y presiona a Norma para que también se mude a la hacienda. En un arrebato de celos, Concha llega a la fiesta y le dispara a Leonidas al verlo con Melisa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma asiste a la exposición de caballos, Carmela hostiga a la empleada que cuida al bebé y se queda con él con malas intenciones, Norma se devuelve a tiempo y la saca a empujones del cuarto.
